overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character exploring a wizarding school common room. The character walks along an upper corridor with ornate wooden architecture, descends a spiral staircase, and enters a large warmly-lit common room with other students and a ghostly NPC.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper corridor with ornate round door

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the corridor past the large round door with stained glass panels

entered.detail: large circular wooden door with green floral stained glass panels and iron studs
rough stone brick wall covered with climbing green ivy vines
lit wall-mounted lantern with warm orange glow and metal frame
ornately carved wooden balustrade with spherical finials
long green patterned carpet running down the corridor center

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow enclosed corridor with a distinctive round wooden door featuring stained glass on the right. The walls are stone with climbing ivy, and a wall lantern provides warm illumination. The wooden railing of an upper walkway is visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway and spiral staircase descent

events.description: character stops walking to observe a framed painting on the left wall
character begins descending the wooden spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: pausing briefly to examine a wall painting before descending the spiral staircase toward a ghostly figure

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostly figure standing at the bottom of the staircase

entered.detail: wooden spiral staircase with carved railings winding downward
rectangular framed landscape painting hanging on the stone wall
large green fern in terracotta pot beside the staircase entrance

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along an elevated walkway with wooden railings, then stops to examine a framed painting on the wall. After a brief pause, the character descends a wooden spiral staircase where a ghostly translucent figure awaits at the bottom.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room with fireplace and seating areas

events.description: exits the staircase and enters the open common room space with high ceilings
character approaches and interacts with the ghostly figure near the dessert table

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room, approaching a ghostly NPC and observing other students seated by the fireplace

notable_agents.action: ghostly translucent figure hovering near the dessert display
group of students sitting on red sofas conversing near the fireplace

entered.detail: large arched stone fireplace with burning fire and carved mantle
plush red velvet sofa with students seated on it
wooden table with tiered stand holding cakes and pastries
large circular patterned rug with red and gold motifs
dark circular arched doorway at the far end of the room

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious common room with a high vaulted ceiling, stone fireplace, and comfortable seating areas. The character approaches a ghostly figure near a dessert table while other students relax on red sofas. The room features stone tile floors with large circular rugs and warm lighting from wall sconces and the fireplace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, ivy-clad corridor into the expansive warmth of a wizarding common room. It begins by tracking along a stone walkway past a stained-glass wooden door and flickering wall lanterns, moving steadily toward an elevated railing. As the character pauses to examine a framed painting, the perspective shifts downward, descending a wooden spiral staircase toward a translucent ghostly figure waiting below. The scene then opens into a spacious hall with high vaulted ceilings and stone tile floors, where the lighting transitions from the dim corridor to the golden glow of a large fireplace. Finally, the camera glides past students relaxing on red sofas and circular rugs, approaching the ghost beside a dessert table.
